subcodes.first_line: O assured leaf! The glances of favor of the Ever-Living, the Self-Subsisting Lord encompass thee, and His grace and bounties are complete [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ورقه موقنه نظر الطاف حی قیوم شاملست و فضل و عنایت کامل حال استعداد و
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual prerequisites of teaching the Cause, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God
